events.summary: Phase 0 (Research) opened. User selected Option C from the rebuild brainstorm: migrate dashboard to Next.js + share fitme-story design system + components. Full PM cycle per v7.6 framework rules; case study tracked from day one. work_subtype=new_ui (stack migration, not v2 in-place refactor).

Phase 0 (Research) approved. User selected Arch A (dashboard as route in fitme-story) + Pattern 4.b (pre-build sync). User added critical new requirement: blind-switch so dashboard becomes invisible to outside sources when product goes live, AND architecture must allow future extraction of dashboard back to internal-only access. PRD must commit to: 3-layer visibility control (route-level auth gate, sitemap+robots exclusion, build-time inclusion flag) + extraction-ready code layout (everything under control-room/ prefix, no reverse imports from showcase).

Phase 1 (PRD) opened. Drafting against v7.6 mandatory PRD sections (primary metric, baseline, target, kill criteria, secondary, guardrails — all T1/T2/T3 tagged). Must include Analytics Spec (requires_analytics=true) and now also a Visibility Control Spec for the blind-switch requirement.

Phase 1 (PRD) approved with all 4 §15 open-question defaults locked: Q1=B (Next.js middleware basic-auth, dashboard-only — showcase stays public per user explicit), Q2=A (inline sync script), Q3=A (localStorage view persistence), Q4=A (no preview route). PRD has 16 sections, all rule #2 gates filled, Analytics Spec checklist complete, blind-switch 3-layer design + extraction-ready architecture committed.

Phase 2 (Tasks) opened. Breaking PRD into dependency-ordered, skill-tagged subtasks per CLAUDE.md task structure. Lane assignment via v5.1 task-complexity gate (E-core lightweight vs P-core heavyweight).

Phase 2 (Tasks) approved. 42 tasks across 9 work blocks; ~5-week calendar estimate; ~96 CU. All 3 Phase 3 open-questions answered: (1) KanbanBoard+TableView get full UX spec treatment, (2) reuse fitme-story Hero verbatim, (3) yes Linear-style command palette.

Phase 3 (UX) opened. Will produce: ux-research.md, ux-spec.md (full spec for all routes incl. KanbanBoard + TableView), design-system compliance gateway report, 2 handoff prompts (ux-build + design-build). Reuses fitme-story Hero verbatim. Adds Cmd+K command palette (T30.5).

Phase 3 (UX) approved. Spec deliverables: ux-research.md (10KB), ux-spec.md (26KB, full spec for 4 routes + Cmd+K palette), design-compliance-gateway.md (PASS conditional on T16), 2 handoff prompts (ux-build + design-build). 6 components verbatim from fitme-story, 9 ported+restyled, 8 new. Compliance: tokens/components/patterns/motion all PASS; a11y PASS conditional on T16 axe audit.

Phase 4 (Implement) opened. Starting T1 (instrument current Astro dashboard with dashboard_load + dashboard_blocker_acknowledged GA4 events) immediately so the 7-day TTC baseline clock starts NOW. T2 baseline capture is the explicit hard gate before T18+ component port can begin (~7 days from now).
T1 started: adding dashboard_load + dashboard_blocker_acknowledged GA4 events to Astro dashboard (fit-tracker2.vercel.app).

T1 SHIPPED: Astro dashboard instrumented with TTC events. analytics.js helper + gtag in DashboardLayout (async, defer per react-best-practices) + Dashboard.jsx mount fires dashboard_load + AlertsBanner onClick fires dashboard_blocker_acknowledged with time_since_load_ms. Build green. Pushed as commit 19b0411. Vercel auto-deploys. PUBLIC_GA_ID env var needed in Vercel project to activate event collection.

T1 done (T1 marked done; PUBLIC_GA_ID set in fit-tracker2 Vercel project per user). T2 baseline window OPEN — passive 7-day collection until ~2026-05-03. Starting parallel work: T3 (sync script), T8/T9/T10 (blind-switch 3 layers), T13 (ESLint reverse-import rule).

Block B (sync infra) + Block C (blind-switch + ESLint) + most of Block D shipped to fitme-story main as commit 441f531. Tasks done this session: T1, T3, T4, T8, T9, T10, T13. T2 baseline window passively collecting. Sync script verified working (33 shared + 43 features in ~80ms). All 3 blind-switch layers in place. proxy.ts uses Next.js 16 pattern (NOT middleware.ts) with no runtime declaration. ESLint reverse-import rule active. Build green. Next: T11 verify-blind-switch.sh + T12 CI job; then wait for T2 to close before unblocking T18+.

Blind-switch verification: 4/5 curls green on production fitme-story.vercel.app. /control-room returns 401 with WWW-Authenticate Basic realm; robots.txt Disallow present; sitemap.xml has 0 control-room URLs; / showcase remains 200 public.

T11 + T12 shipped to fitme-story (commit 8edc96f). verify-blind-switch.sh + GitHub Action via deployment_status event (no VERCEL_TOKEN needed). 5/5 assertions pass against production. Also marking T5 + T7 done in state.json (Option B vercel.json + local-dev sync verified earlier this session).

T15 shipped — token-map.md (commit 749bedc). 27 dashboard tokens mapped to fitme-story; 2 exact hex matches (skill-release, skill-research), 4 scoped --cr-* additions for radii/shadows/medium-priority, 6 pairs flagged for T16 axe audit.
